staged_emails.subject: A note from Clarion
staged_emails.body: Hi Miguel - Looking at Rodriguez & Associates' client reviews, I noticed a shift in sentiment patterns over the past 6 months that may be worth discussing. Most firms only see these trends after they've impacted operations. Clarion converts your public client feedback into a structured governance brief that gives partners early visibility into emerging patterns. If you're open to it, I can walk through what that would look like using a sample of your firm's actual reviews.

reason: SMTP_PASS is a placeholder ('NEEDS_ZOHO_APP_PASSWORD'). Set a real Zoho app password in .env before outreach will send. Generate at: https://accounts.zoho.com/home#security > App-Specific Passwords.
